name: Article Writer
description: Transforms weekly briefing top stories into full-length news articles with programmatic SVG illustrations. Writes in the style of professional international press (CNN, CNBC, NYT, Politico, Internazionale). Can run daily as a standalone agent or as part of the weekly pipeline.

content_guidelines.tone: Professional international press — authoritative, analytical, accessible
content_guidelines.ai_disclaimer: This article was generated by an AI system (Claude) as part of the Stratoterra geopolitical intelligence platform. It synthesizes publicly available data and should not be taken as financial advice. All sources are cited below.
content_guidelines.svg_style: Abstract, data-driven, geometric. No photographic or realistic imagery.
